mission.title: Our Mission

qas.question: ✨ How long do press-on nails last?
qas.answer: It depends on how you apply them! With nail tabs, they last about 1–2 days (perfect for an event 💃). With glue, they can stay on up to 1–2 weeks if you take care of them 💕

qas.question: ✨ What comes in the set?
qas.answer:
Each set includes: 
 - 10 nails (depending on your size) 
 - Nail glue + sticky tabs 
 - Mini file & cuticle stick 
 - Everything you need for the perfect at-home manicure ✨

qas.question: ✨ How do I apply and remove them? Is it difficult?
qas.answer: Not at all! 🥰 Application takes just a few minutes: prep your nails, apply glue/tabs, and press. Removal is easy too — just soak in warm water + a bit of oil, and they’ll slide off gently 💧🌸

qas.question: ✨ Can I customize the size or shape?
qas.answer: Yes of course! 💅 You can choose length (short/medium/long) and shape (coffin, almond, square, stiletto). If you want something extra special, just message me 💖

qas.question: ✨ Can I reuse them?
qas.answer: Definitely! If you remove them carefully and clean off the glue, you can wear them multiple times 🫶 Perfect for saving your fave designs.

qas.question: ✨ Are they safe for my natural nails?
qas.answer: Yes 💕 Press-ons are much gentler than acrylics or gels. As long as you remove them properly, your natural nails stay healthy and strong 🌿✨

qas.question: ✨ How long does shipping take?
qas.answer: Shipping usually takes 3–7 business days (US). I always pack and ship orders as quickly as I can 📦💌

qas.question: ✨ Do you take custom design requests?
qas.answer: Yes!! 🎨 I love making custom sets. If you have inspo pics, colors, or themes, just let me know and I’ll create something unique just for you 💖

qas.question: ✨ What glue do you recommend?
qas.answer: I include glue in every set 💕 But if you want extra-strong hold, I recommend Kiss Nail Glue or Nailene – they’re amazing for long wear!

qas.question: ✨ Do you make different nail lengths?
qas.answer: Yes ✨ Short, medium, long, and extra long — you can pick the length that matches your vibe 🔥

qas.question: ✨ What if a nail doesn’t fit me perfectly?
qas.answer: Don’t worry! Sets come with extra sizes, so you’ll always find a match. You can also file the edges a little for a perfect custom fit 💕
